Here's the result of running `cat -n` on C:\Users\GIGABYTE\AppData\Local\Temp\FORGE_workspace_d26ff1f984614ee98b94f0ec24c7beb1_ogluk5vg\models.py:
1	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
2	from flask_login import UserMixin
3	from datetime import datetime
4	
5	db = SQLAlchemy()
6	
7	class User(UserMixin, db.Model):
8	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
9	    username = db.Column(db.String(150), unique=True, nullable=False)
10	    password = db.Column(db.String(150), nullable=False)
11	    tasks = db.relationship('Task', backref='owner', lazy=True)
12	
13	class Task(db.Model):
14	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
15	    title = db.Column(db.String(200), nullable=False)
16	    description = db.Column(db.Text, nullable=True)
17	    priority = db.Column(db.String(20), default='Medium')
18	    due_date = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
19	    is_done = db.Column(db.Boolean, default=False)
20	    user_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('user.id'), nullable=False)
21	    created_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
